job:
About the job
🚀 We’re Hiring: AI Executor with leading IT Service and Consulting Company!!



📍 Location: Ahmedabad
🗓️ Working Days: 5 Days a Week
🏢 Mode: Work from Office
💼 Experience Required: 2+ Years


🔍 Key Responsibilities:



Design and develop robust backend solutions in Python, focused on AI/ML features.
Build, train, and integrate ML models using frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, and LangChain.
Work with AI APIs such as OpenAI, Claude, and Hugging Face to implement intelligent solutions.
Develop and manage REST APIs and microservices for seamless AI integration.
Optimize ML pipelines for performance, scalability, and reliability.
Translate business requirements into practical AI use cases and deliver impactful solutions.
Stay updated with the latest trends in AI/ML and drive innovation


✅ Must-Have Qualifications:



2+ years of experience in Software / AI / ML Engineering with strong backend expertise in Python.
Hands-on experience with ML libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, etc.
Exposure to AI platforms and APIs (OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, Hugging Face).
Experience building RESTful services and microservices.
Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills.




📩 Interested candidates can share their resumes at priyanka@thepremierconsultants.com
